title: Surgical retractor with connection to pedicle screws
abstract: A surgical retractor (10) includes a shaft (12). A first end of the shaft (12) includes a connector (16) connectable to a system frame. A second end of the shaft (12) includes a foot blade (18). The foot blade (18) includes a toe (20) parallel to the shaft (12) and perpendicular to the foot blade (18). The foot blade (18) of the surgical retractor (10) is connectable to a pedicle screw (28).
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. Apparatus comprising: a surgical retractor (10) comprising a shaft (12), a first end of said shaft (12) comprising a connector (16) connectable to a system frame and a second end of said shaft (12) comprising a foot blade (18), wherein said foot blade (18) comprises a toe (20) parallel to said shaft (12) and perpendicular to said foot blade (18). 2. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein said foot blade (18) extends perpendicular to said shaft (12). 3. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein said foot blade (18) has a flat surface (22) that extends between said shaft (12) and said toe (20). 4. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein a bottom of said toe (20) is rounded. 5. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein said surgical retractor (10) is connected to a pedicle screw (28), said pedicle screw (28) comprising a head (30) and a set screw (26), and said foot blade (18) is placed under said set screw (26). 6. The apparatus according to claim 3, wherein said surgical retractor (10) is connected to a pedicle screw (28), said pedicle screw (28) comprising a head (30) and a set screw (26), and said foot blade (18) is placed under said set screw (26) and said set screw (26) sits on said flat surface (22). 7. The apparatus according to claim 5, further comprising a tower (24) that abuts against said foot blade (18). 8. The apparatus according to claim 6, further comprising a tower (24) that abuts against said foot blade (18).
